anti_patterns.description: 12 patterns that instantly expose AI-generated content. ALWAYS include relevant ones in the negative prompt.

patterns.name: porcelain_skin
patterns.negative_prompt: no airbrushed skin, no porcelain smooth texture, no plastic-looking skin

patterns.name: symmetrical_face
patterns.negative_prompt: no perfectly symmetrical face, no uncanny valley symmetry

patterns.name: dead_eyes
patterns.negative_prompt: no lifeless eyes, no vacant stare, no doll-like eyes, no perfectly round iris

patterns.name: perfect_hair
patterns.negative_prompt: no helmet hair, no perfectly placed strands, no unnaturally shiny hair

patterns.name: floating_objects
patterns.negative_prompt: no floating products, no objects defying gravity, no impossible hand positions

patterns.name: sterile_background
patterns.negative_prompt: no empty blank backgrounds, no studio-perfect lighting, no stock photo backdrop

patterns.name: wrong_hand_anatomy
patterns.negative_prompt: no extra fingers, no fused fingers, no distorted hands, no impossible grip

patterns.name: uniform_lighting
patterns.negative_prompt: no perfectly even lighting, no shadowless scene, no HDR-flat look

patterns.name: generic_expression
patterns.negative_prompt: no default smile, no neutral stock expression, no frozen mid-expression

patterns.name: text_artifacts
patterns.negative_prompt: no garbled text on products, no unreadable labels, no AI-generated text

patterns.name: oversaturated_colors
patterns.negative_prompt: no oversaturated colors, no neon skin tones, no unrealistic color grading

patterns.name: jewelry_physics_break
patterns.negative_prompt: no floating jewelry, no earrings defying gravity, no chains going through skin
